9)

"Final slow cinematic push-in as he takes another bite and small leaves pass across the frame."

Seedance 2.0 - adheres to the prompt, with a slow camera push-in, the man taking just a bite of the taco, and leaves passing across the frame.

Sora 2 - no camera push-in, the man https://t.co/ZRxtTnubl2

7)

"Low angle shot of fabric folds and robe movement as the wind passes."

Seedance 2.0 - follows the prompt, with natural fabric movement and steaming food that makes the shot feel more alive.

Sora 2 - no movement at all. https://t.co/gvX47px9Fg

6)

"Over-the-shoulder shot showing the quiet fantasy landscape in front of him, distant clouds slowly drifting."

Seedance 2.0 - prompt-accurate, with natural hair and clothes movement in the wind.

Sora 2 - the prompt is not fully followed, clouds are not moving, there is https://t.co/YJ7IaKLO2i

4)

"Close-up shot of the taco filling slightly shifting as he takes a bite, warm light reflecting on the chopsticks."

Seedance 2.0 - perfectly captured food details, biting motion, and realistic food movement.

Sora 2 - not following the prompt, no biting at all. https://t.co/Da2L5BJyAh
